Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Darius Allbright]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 6''' — Darius Allbright is a Captain of the Knights of the White Sun.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 6''' — Darius Allbright uses an Awakened pen that leaves permanent ink on his skin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 6''' — Darius carries a sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 8''' — Darius's face is a flat plane of darkness where his eyes, nose, and mouth should be.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 8''' — Darius is a Knight-Adjunct.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 8''' — Darius Allbright is the grandson of Jameson Allbright.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 8''' — Darius Allbright is the grandson of Jameson Allbright.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 8''' — Darius Allbright is a Knight-Adjunct.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 8''' — Darius Allbright is considered Elder-touched.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 8''' — Darius Allbright is described as a man without a face.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 8''' — Darius is sitting on the Guild Head's desk.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 11''' — Darius Allbright was subject to an Elder curse that Maxeus tried to banish years ago.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 11''' — Darius Allbright has a black Elder void for a face.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 11''' — Darius Allbright wears silvery armor and carries a gleaming sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 11''' — Darius is an ally of the female character (implied to be Shera) whom she barely knows.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 19''' — Darius has an Elder-shadowed condition caused by a run-in with Elderspawn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 21''' — Darius' armor is blackened or charred.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — Darius Allbright is the grandson of Jameson Allbright and wears an armored body with a hooded face.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 2''' — Allbright is onboard with a deal for peace between the Guilds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 4''' — Darius Allbright's face is replaced by a black circle of nothingness.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 20''' — Darius Allbright's grandfather struggled under the title of Guild Head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — Darius Allbright is helping the Luminian Order coordinate city evacuation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — Darius Allbright has a spawn of Urg’naut wrapped around his face.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — Darius Allbright heard the whispers of the void and felt the cold wind of Urg’naut approaching.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — Darius Allbright's body is used by a Great Elder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — Darius is the host for Urg'naut.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — Shera was an inch from Darius' chest.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
